summary: Passionate and detail-oriented Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience in building responsive and scalable web applications. Skilled in modern web technologies and committed to writing clean, efficient code. Strong problem-solving abilities with a focus on delivering high-quality user experiences. Eager to contribute to dynamic development teams and continuously enhance technical expertise.

skills.name: Git & GitHub, VS Code, Deployment Workflows

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.workSummary:
• Developed and maintained full-stack web applications using modern technologies.
  • Collaborated with cross-functional teams to design and implement scalable solutions.
  • Wrote clean, maintainable, and efficient code following best practices.
  • Debugged and resolved technical issues to improve application performance.
  • Participated in code reviews and contributed to improving development workflows.

projects.projectSummary:
• Built dynamic, responsive front-end components using React.js with hooks and context API for state management.
  • Developed secure RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.js to handle CRUD operations and user authentication.
  • Designed and optimized MongoDB schema with Mongoose for efficient data storage and retrieval of user tasks.
  • Implemented JWT-based authentication and authorization to ensure secure access to user data.

• Created a social networking platform specifically for developers to connect and share knowledge.
  • Enabled user profiles, post creation, likes, and comments functionality.
  • Implemented authentication and protected routes.
  • Designed scalable backend APIs for handling user interactions and smooth navigation experience.

additionalSections.title: Hobbies
additionalSections.content: Playing BGMI, chess, and exploring modern UI patterns.
